description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline that uses the docker:stable image with a docker:dind service, sets DOCKER_DRIVER to overlay2 and DOCKER_HOST to tcp://docker:2375, and runs a before_script to log in to the GitLab Container Registry using docker login -u gitlab-ci-token -p $CI_JOB_TOKEN $CI_REGISTRY. Define a single build stage and a build job that runs the command sh build.sh. No caches, artifacts, or conditional rules are defined.
